indications.text:
1.1 Hypertension
BYSTOLIC is indicated for the treatment of hypertension, to lower blood pressure [see Clinical Studies (14.1)].
BYSTOLIC may be used alone or in combination with other antihypertensive agents [see Drug Interactions
(7)].
